markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Deepgram and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and SEO improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/DN9xSGcgzAEBuqKrgMys44wPpMJ7Dk_F?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX analyzed Deepgram's content, identifying gaps in top-of-funnel content and opportunities for keyword ranking](https://fathom.video/share/DN9xSGcgzAEBuqKrgMys44wPpMJ7Dk_F?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Two new content clusters proposed: core voice AI APIs and architecture/intelligence behind voice AI](https://fathom.video/share/DN9xSGcgzAEBuqKrgMys44wPpMJ7Dk_F?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Deepgram plans to create language-specific pages for both speech-to-text and text-to-speech products (100 languages each by year-end)](https://fathom.video/share/DN9xSGcgzAEBuqKrgMys44wPpMJ7Dk_F?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)
  - [Content pruning recommended to improve SEO, as Deepgram has 15,000 pages with many potentially irrelevant](https://fathom.video/share/DN9xSGcgzAEBuqKrgMys44wPpMJ7Dk_F?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

## Topics

### Content Analysis and Strategy

  - [GrowthX analyzed Deepgram's URLs, blog, learn pages, and AI glossary](https://fathom.video/share/DN9xSGcgzAEBuqKrgMys44wPpMJ7Dk_F?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Found gaps in top-of-funnel content related to Deepgram's product](https://fathom.video/share/DN9xSGcgzAEBuqKrgMys44wPpMJ7Dk_F?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Conducted keyword research and competitor analysis (e.g., Eleven Labs)](https://fathom.video/share/DN9xSGcgzAEBuqKrgMys44wPpMJ7Dk_F?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Proposed two new content clusters:](https://fathom.video/share/DN9xSGcgzAEBuqKrgMys44wPpMJ7Dk_F?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
    1.  Core voice AI APIs (speech-to-text, text-to-speech, voice agents)
    2.  Architecture and intelligence for voice AI (technical/developer education)
  - [Goal: Rank higher for key terms like "speech-to-text API" and "speech-to-text"](https://fathom.video/share/DN9xSGcgzAEBuqKrgMys44wPpMJ7Dk_F?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Next steps: Deepgram to review content ideas in Content OS and approve topics](https://fathom.video/share/DN9xSGcgzAEBuqKrgMys44wPpMJ7Dk_F?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)

### SEO Improvements

  - [Deepgram experienced a hit in organic rankings in August 2022 (Google core updates)](https://fathom.video/share/DN9xSGcgzAEBuqKrgMys44wPpMJ7Dk_F?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Current organic traffic: \~30K/month, down from peak of 122,554/month](https://fathom.video/share/DN9xSGcgzAEBuqKrgMys44wPpMJ7Dk_F?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Recommendation: Content pruning to improve crawl budget and site structure](https://fathom.video/share/DN9xSGcgzAEBuqKrgMys44wPpMJ7Dk_F?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [GrowthX to conduct a comprehensive content audit (requires data from SEMrush and Google Search Console)](https://fathom.video/share/DN9xSGcgzAEBuqKrgMys44wPpMJ7Dk_F?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)

### Programmatic SEO

  - [Focus on creating language-specific pages for speech-to-text and text-to-speech](https://fathom.video/share/DN9xSGcgzAEBuqKrgMys44wPpMJ7Dk_F?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)
  - [Deepgram plans 100 languages for each product by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/DN9xSGcgzAEBuqKrgMys44wPpMJ7Dk_F?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [GrowthX can assist with programmatic page creation (2-3 weeks setup time)](https://fathom.video/share/DN9xSGcgzAEBuqKrgMys44wPpMJ7Dk_F?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Deepgram to provide wireframes to accelerate the process](https://fathom.video/share/DN9xSGcgzAEBuqKrgMys44wPpMJ7Dk_F?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)

### Content Production and Timeline

  - [Goal: Ramp up to 5 blog posts per week](https://fathom.video/share/DN9xSGcgzAEBuqKrgMys44wPpMJ7Dk_F?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
  - [Initial results for targeted keywords: 2-3 weeks to 1 month](https://fathom.video/share/DN9xSGcgzAEBuqKrgMys44wPpMJ7Dk_F?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
  - [Overall impact on organic traffic: 3-4 months minimum](https://fathom.video/share/DN9xSGcgzAEBuqKrgMys44wPpMJ7Dk_F?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide average month-over-month traffic increase data from other clients](https://fathom.video/share/DN9xSGcgzAEBuqKrgMys44wPpMJ7Dk_F?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Deepgram to review and approve blog topics in Content OS](https://fathom.video/share/DN9xSGcgzAEBuqKrgMys44wPpMJ7Dk_F?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)
  - [GrowthX to deliver first calibration blog for feedback on voice and tone](https://fathom.video/share/DN9xSGcgzAEBuqKrgMys44wPpMJ7Dk_F?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [Deepgram to provide wireframes for language-specific pages](https://fathom.video/share/DN9xSGcgzAEBuqKrgMys44wPpMJ7Dk_F?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [GrowthX to consult with dev team on programmatic page creation timeline](https://fathom.video/share/DN9xSGcgzAEBuqKrgMys44wPpMJ7Dk_F?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin content audit for pruning recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/DN9xSGcgzAEBuqKrgMys44wPpMJ7Dk_F?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
  - [Follow-up on average traffic increase metrics from other GrowthX clients](https://fathom.video/share/DN9xSGcgzAEBuqKrgMys44wPpMJ7Dk_F?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)
